facebook.caption: POV: you walked into Cung Điện Hải Vương not expecting much. You left two hours later. 4.7 stars across 4,147 reviews. That number earned the hard way. Floor-to-ceiling tanks. Schools of fish moving like one organism. Kids go silent. Adults do too. This is the aquarium Phu Quoc didn't tell you it had. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
